title: heliohebe fairfieldii
intro: Heliohebe fairfieldii, also known as the Fairfield heliohebe, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae, native to New Zealand. It is a shrubby perennial that has been used in traditional Māori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Heliohebe fairfieldii include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
